codeReview.summary: This fix directly addresses the prior css-polish-responsive failure by restoring 375px slippage typography and touch-target thresholds: `.slippage-preset-compact` now uses `min-width: 44px` and 0.75rem font, and `.slippage-box-input`, `.slippage-box-label`, `.slippage-box-hint`, and `.direction-btn` are set to 0.75rem at the 375px media query. The overflow tradeoff is handled by hiding the outer 3 and 300 bps preset buttons at 375px.

summary: PASS: Reviewed the fix transcript skeleton and both relevant diffs (failed commit `5e23b81` and fix commit `4ceb58e6139917d0fccf9569b6eaf5bb8b5a196a`). The fix adequately resolves both prior blocking issues (font-size and touch-target thresholds at 375px) without introducing new blocking defects in scope.
